component.name: DjangoConsoleOptions

option.name: myCustomStartScript

project.component: { "keyToString": { "DefaultHtmlFileTemplate": "HTML File", "Django Server.djangoProject.executor": "Run", "Django 服务器.djangoProject.executor": "Run", "HTTP 请求.generated-requests中的所有.executor": "Run", "Python.__init__.executor": "Run", "Python.ceshi.executor": "Run", "Python.loaddata.executor": "Run", "Python.manage.executor": "Run", "Python.models.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.OpenDjangoStructureViewOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.pycharm.django.structure.promotion.once.per.project": "true", "django.template.preview.state": "SHOW_EDITOR_AND_PREVIEW", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "last_opened_file_path": "E:/shopping/djangoProject/cartsapp", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "run.code.analysis.last.selected.profile": "aDefault", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "typescript.add.unambiguous.imports.on.the.fly": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "ChangesTree.GroupingKeys": [] } }
